# EverythingRated — full agent brief

Multi-axis rating tool for structured directories and catalogs — decisions with explicit trade-offs, not star averages.

## Index

# EverythingRated

Multi-axis ratings for structured directories and catalogs.

## What it is

- Rate items on multiple axes (not a single star score)
- Built for AI/dev tool and catalog decisions

## Agent entrypoints

- https://ratings.highsignal.app/llms.txt
- https://ratings.highsignal.app/api/ai
- https://ratings.highsignal.app/index.md

## Product links

- Home: https://ratings.highsignal.app/ — Directories and ratings

## Machine surfaces

- https://ratings.highsignal.app/llms.txt
